visual_description: The central figure, a pale‑haired man in a black robe, points a wand forward while flanked by two other men in dark clothing who also aim their wands. All three stand in a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with shelves and assorted objects. Their faces are set with focused, serious expressions as they stare ahead.
audio_description: A low, firm male voice speaks, accompanied by faint ambient sounds in the dark setting.
